chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now we are going to write our first program in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: What is a program?

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Programs are basically instructions which we give to our computer or system to perform some work

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: For example, we will take a very simple example of a program

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: This is our python folder and inside it, this is the new file icon

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: As soon as we click on it, a new file will be created for us

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We are going to give the name of the file as code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And we will give an extension to it as .py

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Code is the name of our file

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: If we wanted, we could have given any code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: First code, first program, we could have given any name

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: .py is the extension which basically tells VS Code that we are creating a python file

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: In which python code will be written

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Every file which has different type of data, different type of programming language has a different extension

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: For java, we have .java

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: For C++, we have .cpp

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: For text files, we have .txt

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So this is our python file

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So as soon as we enter, this is our file which has been created for us

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And inside this, we are going to write a simple program

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Print, then quotes, double quotes

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And here we will write, hello world

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: That's it, we have to write such a simple program

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now we will understand its meaning slowly

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We are going to save our file

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We can save it by pressing ctrl s

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And if we want, we can either run our code from here

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Otherwise, here in the terminal, there is a simple command that we can write python3

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And after that, the name of our file which is code.py

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: As soon as we enter, whatever we have written here, it will be printed for us

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: If I write my college here

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Then I am going to see the same output

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So basically, this is the first program which we have created

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: To print hello world on our screen

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now how exactly is this program working?

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Basically, here, this print statement which is written, this is a function

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: In python, we call this line a function

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We call this print a function

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now what exactly are functions?

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We will go ahead and read them in detail

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We will have a dedicated chapter on functions

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: But for now, we can understand that whenever we have to do something in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Generally, we do majority of the work through functions

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Like printing output on our screen

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Its logic is already written in our print function

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: That's why we used it directly

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And this thing which we have printed

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: This is called a string

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Basically, if we have to print any word, sentence, paragraph

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: All these are our strings in programming, in coding

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So generally, we write strings in double quotes

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: If we want, we can write strings in single quote or triple quote

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: But generally, our popular format is to write strings with double quotes

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So whatever we write in double quotes, that function prints it on our screen

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: On our terminal window

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now when we write our codes in python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: All our codes, generally, whenever we do programming

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Whether we use any programming language

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Any code's work is generally a format

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: That it takes some input and returns some output

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And after taking input, generally, there are some computations in code

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Some work is performed and on its basis, some output is produced

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Which can be printed on our terminal window

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Generally, this is the work that our code does for us

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So here, as such, we have just taken input

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now we will learn to take input slowly

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: But how to output things with print

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We have learned that

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Plus, along with this, let's suppose

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: If we have to output multiple values

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Like if we want to print two strings

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Like my first string is hello world

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And if I want to print another string

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Which is hello world with python

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Let's save it, clear and rerun

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So in this way, our two statements

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Every print statement is printed on a different line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: If we want to print them on the same line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: For that, our output, our string

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We can separate it from the comma

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So let's save it

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Let me close this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And we will clear and print this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So all the output will come on the same line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Similarly, if we want to insert a next line in our single statement

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Like I want hello world to come in one line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Or hello to come in one line and world in the next line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: For that, there is a special character that we can use

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Which is backslash n

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We get next line from backslash n

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Next line will look like this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Where hello will come in one line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: After that, we will get next line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And the rest of the output will come in the next line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: The extra space that is being printed before w

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: This is because of this space

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: If we cut this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now the output we have will look like this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So if in our output we want to insert next line

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: At any point we can use this particular character

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now whenever we talk about Python as a programming language

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Python has a particular character set

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Character set means

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: In Python, we can't use Hindi characters

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Or we can use characters of any other language

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: The allowed characters are only part of the programming

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: In this, our English letters come

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: From capital to our upper case and lower case

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Our digits come

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Some special symbols come

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Which we will read in detail in operators

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Some white spaces come

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: From which a character of new line comes

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Which we just saw

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Similarly, our tab character comes

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Which is backslash t

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: And in this way, our blank space is also part

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So multiple types of spaces come

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Plus all our ASCII and Unicode characters

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: ASCII stands for American Standard for Information Interchange

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: So all the characters in this

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Plus Unicode

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We can use them in data

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We will see what are literals exactly

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Now the character set we have read

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: We don't need to remember it or make notes

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Nor anyone will ask us in interviews

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: But we should have a general idea

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: With which programming language we are going to work

chunks.title: video
chunks.text: Which characters are allowed in it

text: Now we are going to write our first program in python What is a program? Programs are basically instructions which we give to our computer or system to perform some work For example, we will take a very simple example of a program This is our python folder and inside it, this is the new file icon As soon as we click on it, a new file will be created for us We are going to give the name of the file as code And we will give an extension to it as .py Code is the name of our file If we wanted, we could have given any code First code, first program, we could have given any name .py is the extension which basically tells VS Code that we are creating a python file In which python code will be written Every file which has different type of data, different type of programming language has a different extension For java, we have .java For C++, we have .cpp For text files, we have .txt So this is our python file So as soon as we enter, this is our file which has been created for us And inside this, we are going to write a simple program Print, then quotes, double quotes And here we will write, hello world That's it, we have to write such a simple program Now we will understand its meaning slowly We are going to save our file We can save it by pressing ctrl s And if we want, we can either run our code from here Otherwise, here in the terminal, there is a simple command that we can write python3 And after that, the name of our file which is code.py As soon as we enter, whatever we have written here, it will be printed for us If I write my college here Then I am going to see the same output So basically, this is the first program which we have created To print hello world on our screen Now how exactly is this program working? Basically, here, this print statement which is written, this is a function In python, we call this line a function We call this print a function Now what exactly are functions? We will go ahead and read them in detail We will have a dedicated chapter on functions But for now, we can understand that whenever we have to do something in python Generally, we do majority of the work through functions Like printing output on our screen Its logic is already written in our print function That's why we used it directly And this thing which we have printed This is called a string Basically, if we have to print any word, sentence, paragraph All these are our strings in programming, in coding So generally, we write strings in double quotes If we want, we can write strings in single quote or triple quote But generally, our popular format is to write strings with double quotes So whatever we write in double quotes, that function prints it on our screen On our terminal window Now when we write our codes in python All our codes, generally, whenever we do programming Whether we use any programming language Any code's work is generally a format That it takes some input and returns some output And after taking input, generally, there are some computations in code Some work is performed and on its basis, some output is produced Which can be printed on our terminal window Generally, this is the work that our code does for us So here, as such, we have just taken input Now we will learn to take input slowly But how to output things with print We have learned that Plus, along with this, let's suppose If we have to output multiple values Like if we want to print two strings Like my first string is hello world And if I want to print another string Which is hello world with python Let's save it, clear and rerun So in this way, our two statements Every print statement is printed on a different line If we want to print them on the same line For that, our output, our string We can separate it from the comma So let's save it Let me close this And we will clear and print this So all the output will come on the same line Similarly, if we want to insert a next line in our single statement Like I want hello world to come in one line Or hello to come in one line and world in the next line For that, there is a special character that we can use Which is backslash n We get next line from backslash n Next line will look like this Where hello will come in one line After that, we will get next line And the rest of the output will come in the next line The extra space that is being printed before w This is because of this space If we cut this Now the output we have will look like this So if in our output we want to insert next line At any point we can use this particular character Now whenever we talk about Python as a programming language Python has a particular character set Character set means In Python, we can't use Hindi characters Or we can use characters of any other language The allowed characters are only part of the programming In this, our English letters come From capital to our upper case and lower case Our digits come Some special symbols come Which we will read in detail in operators Some white spaces come From which a character of new line comes Which we just saw Similarly, our tab character comes Which is backslash t And in this way, our blank space is also part So multiple types of spaces come Plus all our ASCII and Unicode characters ASCII stands for American Standard for Information Interchange So all the characters in this Plus Unicode We can use them in data We will see what are literals exactly Now the character set we have read We don't need to remember it or make notes Nor anyone will ask us in interviews But we should have a general idea With which programming language we are going to work Which characters are allowed in it
